description_long: This is a medium-sized donkey with a robust, rounded body and a short, slightly arched neck. Its coat is predominantly dark brown to black, with a lighter grayish muzzle and facial area. The donkey has upright, pointed ears that are relatively large and set high on the head, with subtle inner markings. Its legs are sturdy and end in small, rounded hooves, and the tail is thin with a small tuft at the end. The overall surface appears matte and slightly textured, suggesting a short, dense fur. The donkey's posture is natural and lifelike, suitable for placement in urban or rural environments.
description: A dark brown to black donkey with a rounded body, upright ears, and a lighter gray muzzle, featuring a matte, slightly textured surface.
description_view_0: Side view showing the donkey's full body profile, upright ears, and the lighter muzzle.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the symmetrical face, large ears, and the lighter color around the muzzle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the body profile and tail, with the head turned slightly.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the rounded back, tail, and the alignment of the legs.
attribute_ears: The donkey's ears are large, upright, and pointed, positioned high on the head. They are dark in color with subtle lighter inner markings and have a smooth, slightly tapered shape.
attribute_tail: The tail is thin and medium in length, extending straight down from the rear with a small, dark tuft at the end. It is consistent in color with the body and lacks visible markings.
attribute_hooves: There are four small, rounded hooves, all dark in color with a smooth appearance and no visible markings or texture details.
attribute_mane: The mane is not distinctly visible in these images, suggesting it is either very short or closely cropped along the neck, blending with the dark coloration of the body.
attribute_facial_markings: The donkey has a lighter gray muzzle and facial area, with the rest of the face being dark. No distinct or patterned facial markings are visible beyond this color transition.
